title: SpaNorm: spatially-aware normalization for spatial transcriptomics data.
author: Salim A Bhuva DD Chen C Tan CW Yang P Davis MJ Yang JYH
content: S-EPMC12039303 PMC12039303 SpaNorm: spatially-aware normalization for spatial transcriptomics data. Normalization of spatial transcriptomics data is challenging due to spatial association between region-specific library size and biology. We develop SpaNorm, the first spatially-aware normalization
